reviewStatusReason: All UI checks passed. Major issues (onChange value shape inconsistency, internal class name coupling) are already covered by existing review comments. No new unaddressed critical or major issues found.

statuses.name: Default
statuses.description: ColorInput with default props showing white color swatch (FFFFFF), hex input field, and opacity field showing 100%

statuses.name: With Opacity
statuses.description: ColorInput with showOpacity enabled, showing orange swatch (FF5733), hex input, and opacity field showing 80%

statuses.name: Without Opacity
statuses.description: ColorInput with showOpacity disabled, showing black swatch (000000) and hex input only — no opacity field rendered

statuses.name: Disabled
statuses.description: ColorInput in disabled state showing muted gray swatch (CCCCCC), grayed-out hex input, and opacity field showing 50% — all with proper disabled visual treatment
